module.name: scolvx
module.description: Origin Locator X — next-generation event and origin review GUI. A modern rework of scolv built on the mainx application framework, featuring a cleaner layout with dedicated Location, Magnitudes, Event and Events tabs. All core picking and location functionality is provided by the shared SeisComP GUI library.

option.description: Load origin with given public ID at startup.
Load event with given public ID at startup.
Start in offline mode. No messaging connection is established.
Load event parameters from an XML file and switch to offline mode.
Override the number of days to preload from the database.

parameter.name: loadEventDB
parameter.description: Number of days to read from the database at startup.

parameter.name: magnitudes
parameter.description: List of magnitude types to be calculated when computing magnitudes. This list can be altered interactively, so it reflects only the default unless computeMagnitudesSilently is set to true. The configured types should include all types also computed by scmag.

parameter.name: visibleMagnitudes
parameter.description: A list of magnitude types to be displayed in the summary panel (F8).

parameter.name: button0
parameter.description: Label of the button that triggers the script defined in "scripts.script0".

parameter.name: button1
parameter.description: Label of the button that triggers the script defined in "scripts.script1".

group.name: scripts
group.description: Names of executable scripts linked to the Publish button.

parameter.name: export
parameter.description: Full path to the script which enables a Publish button in the summary panel on the left side of scolvx (F8). The event public ID is passed as the first argument.

parameter.name: script0
parameter.description: Full path to the script executed when clicking the button labeled with "button0". OriginID and EventID are passed as arguments.

parameter.name: script1
parameter.description: Full path to the script executed when clicking the button labeled with "button1". OriginID and EventID are passed as arguments.

parameter.name: silentTerminate
parameter.description: Silently terminate a running export script when closing scolvx, instead of asking for confirmation.

parameter.name: defaultEventType
parameter.description: Sets the default event type used when confirming a solution. If not set, the event type is not changed unless "with options" is used. The origin must already be associated with an event.

parameter.name: commonEventTypes
parameter.description: A list of event types which are commonly set. Defines a priority list displayed on top of the event type selection menu. Remaining types are displayed with less contrast.

parameter.name: defaultMagnitudeAggregation
parameter.description: Sets the default magnitude aggregation method. If not set, the default behaviour computes the mean for fewer than 4 stations, trimmed mean otherwise.

parameter.name: computeMagnitudesAfterRelocate
parameter.description: Automatically compute magnitudes after relocating an origin.

parameter.name: computeMagnitudesSilently
parameter.description: Start magnitude computation without user interaction if everything runs without errors. In case of errors a window pops up with the current state of processing.

parameter.name: enableMagnitudeSelection
parameter.description: If enabled, a magnitude selection popup will open before computing magnitudes. The default selection reflects the "magnitudes" parameter.

parameter.name: Pvel
parameter.description: P-wave reduction velocity used in the travel-time curve display.

parameter.name: drawMapLines
parameter.description: Draw lines from the origin to associated stations on the map.

parameter.name: drawGridLines
parameter.description: Draw grid lines in the polar residual plots.

parameter.name: computeMissingTakeOffAngles
parameter.description: Compute take-off angles for arrivals that do not have them stored. Required for first-motion polarity display.

parameter.name: defaultAddStationsDistance
parameter.description: Default distance in degrees for adding unassociated stations in the picker.

parameter.name: loadAdditionalStations
parameter.description: If enabled, all stations within the configured distance will be loaded when a new origin is loaded.

parameter.name: hideStationsWithoutData
parameter.description: If enabled, all traces without data and arrivals are hidden in the picker.

parameter.name: hideDisabledStations
parameter.description: If enabled, all traces of disabled stations without picks are hidden in the picker.

parameter.name: defaultDepth
parameter.description: Default depth used when creating an artificial origin.

parameter.name: artificialOriginAdvanced
parameter.description: Show advanced input parameters in the artificial origin dialog.

parameter.name: systemTray
parameter.description: Show a system tray icon and display a notification when a new event is received.

parameter.name: unassociatedMaxDist
parameter.description: Maximum distance in degrees up to which unassociated stations are shown on the map. 360 deg shows all unassociated stations.

parameter.name: defaultRadius
parameter.description: Default map radius in degrees when a new event is selected. A negative value restores the default behaviour.

parameter.name: visibleColumns
parameter.description: Defines the visible columns in the arrival table. Valid tokens: Used, Status, Phase, Weight, Method, Polarity, Takeoff, Net, Sta, Loc/Cha, Timeres, Dis, Az, Time, +/-, Slo, Slores, Baz, Bazres, Created, Latency

parameter.name: showUncertainties
parameter.description: Whether the arrival plot shows uncertainties by default. Can be toggled with 'e' or via the context menu at runtime.

parameter.name: interface
parameter.description: The default locator interface to use.

parameter.name: defaultProfile
parameter.description: The default locator profile to use.

parameter.name: minimumDepth
parameter.description: Minimum depth set when the locator supports fixing depth. If the computed depth is shallower, it is fixed to this value and the origin is relocated again.

parameter.name: presetFromOrigin
parameter.description: Preset locator settings from the loaded origin. Tries to infer the locator type from Origin.methodID and the profile from Origin.earthModelID.

group.name: import
group.description: Default options for the "Import picks" dialog.

parameter.name: mode
parameter.description: Default mode for importing picks. See the "Import picks" dialog for details.

parameter.name: acceptedPhases
parameter.description: List of accepted or denied phases when importing picks. A phase prepended with a minus (e.g. "-P") is denied.

parameter.name: allAgencies
parameter.description: Default for "Import picks from all agencies".

parameter.name: allPhases
parameter.description: Default for "Import all phases".

parameter.name: preferTargetPhases
parameter.description: Default for "Prefer phases of target".

parameter.name: forceEventAssociation
parameter.description: Activate "Force association with event" by default when committing with additional options.

parameter.name: fixOrigin
parameter.description: Activate "Fix this origin as preferred solution" by default when committing with additional options.

parameter.name: returnToEventList
parameter.description: Return to the event list after committing with additional options.

parameter.name: eventCommentOptions
parameter.description: Turns the event comment input field into a drop-down box with predefined values. Values may still be edited if required.

parameter.name: originAgencyIDs
parameter.description: A list of agencyIDs that can be used as an override for the origin agencyID when committing with options.

parameter.name: originComments
parameter.description: A list of origin comment profiles used to populate origin comments when committing an origin.

parameter.name: id
parameter.description: The ID of the comment to add, update or remove.

parameter.name: label
parameter.description: The label shown in the commit dialog.

parameter.name: options
parameter.description: List of values to populate the drop-down list with.

parameter.name: allowFreeText
parameter.description: Allow free text in addition to predefined values.

parameter.name: magnitudeComments
parameter.description: A list of magnitude comment profiles used to populate magnitude comments when committing a magnitude.

parameter.name: id
parameter.description: The ID of the comment to add, update or remove.

parameter.name: label
parameter.description: The label shown in the magnitude view.

parameter.name: options
parameter.description: List of values to populate the drop-down list with.

parameter.name: allowFreeText
parameter.description: Allow free text in addition to predefined values.

group.name: customCommits
group.description: Configure custom commit buttons that behave like shortcuts to "Commit with additional options". Pressing a custom button does not open a popup; it applies the configured options directly. Each button can have a label and colour.

parameter.name: enable
parameter.description: Enable this commit button.

parameter.name: askForConfirmation
parameter.description: Present the "commit with options" dialog pre-populated from this configuration. Cancelling aborts the commit.

parameter.name: forceEventAssociation
parameter.description: Associate the new origin with the currently active event.

parameter.name: fixOrigin
parameter.description: Fix the origin as the preferred solution.

parameter.name: eventType
parameter.description: Event type to set. Leave empty to leave unchanged. Use quotes for types with spaces, e.g. "not existing".

parameter.name: eventTypeCertainty
parameter.description: Event type certainty to set. Leave empty to leave unchanged.

parameter.name: originStatus
parameter.description: Origin status to set. Leave empty to leave unchanged.

parameter.name: magnitudeType
parameter.description: Preferred magnitude type to set. Leave empty to leave unchanged; set to empty string to reset the fixed type.

parameter.name: eventName
parameter.description: Optional event name to set.

parameter.name: eventComment
parameter.description: Optional event comment to set.

parameter.name: returnToEventList
parameter.description: Return to the event list after committing.

parameter.name: label
parameter.description: Commit button label.

parameter.name: color
parameter.description: Optional primary colour for the button (hexadecimal).

parameter.name: colorText
parameter.description: Optional text colour for the button (hexadecimal).

parameter.name: tooltip
parameter.description: Add a summary of the actions to the button tooltip.

group.name: commandMenuAction
group.description: Configuration of custom commands. Each command creates an action in a "Run" menu button next to the Relocate button in the Location tab. Actions appear in the order listed.

struct.description: Definition of a command menu action.

parameter.name: enable
parameter.description: Controls whether this action is available.

parameter.name: command
parameter.description: Command to execute. The current origin ID is passed as the first argument and event ID as the second (if available). The full origin may be written to stdin if an exporter is configured.

parameter.name: exporter
parameter.description: SeisComP exporter used to serialise the current origin when writing it to stdin. If empty, nothing is sent to stdin. See 'sccnv --list-formats' for available options.

parameter.name: showProcess
parameter.description: Automatically open the process manager when this command runs. Can also be opened from the View menu.

parameter.name: text
parameter.description: Name of the action shown in the launch menu and process manager.

parameter.name: icon
parameter.description: Path to an icon for this action.

parameter.name: keySequence
parameter.description: Keyboard shortcut for this action, e.g. "Ctrl+Alt+A".

parameter.name: toolTip
parameter.description: Tooltip shown when hovering over the button.

group.name: picker
group.description: Parameters controlling the phase picker window.

parameter.name: showCrossHairCursor
parameter.description: Activate a cross-hair cursor showing configured uncertainties when in picking mode.

parameter.name: loadAllPicks
parameter.description: Load all existing picks for the requested data time window.

parameter.name: ignoreUnconfiguredStations
parameter.description: If enabled, stations not configured with a detecStream in global bindings are not added in the picker.

parameter.name: limitStationAcquisition
parameter.description: Limit data acquisition to the number of nearest stations given by "picker.limitStationAcquisitionCount".

parameter.name: limitStationAcquisitionCount
parameter.description: Limit data acquisition to this number of nearest stations. Requires "picker.limitStationAcquisition" to be enabled.

parameter.name: loadStrongMotion
parameter.description: If enabled, acceleration data is loaded for co-located stations where picks were made on velocity data.

parameter.name: loadAllComponents
parameter.description: Load all three components by default. If disabled, additional components are fetched on request.

parameter.name: showAllComponents
parameter.description: Show all three components in the picker zoom trace. The distance is limited by "picker.allComponentsMaximumDistance".

parameter.name: allComponentsMaximumDistance
parameter.description: Distance limit for the "picker.showAllComponents" flag.

parameter.name: usePerStreamTimeWindows
parameter.description: If enabled, data is requested around the P pick for each station. Otherwise origin time is used and the time window is the same for all stations.

parameter.name: removeAutomaticPicksFromStationAfterManualReview
parameter.description: After picking and returning to scolvx, all automatic arrivals are removed from a station if a manual pick exists there.

parameter.name: removeAllAutomaticPicksAfterManualReview
parameter.description: After picking and returning to scolvx, all automatic arrivals are removed from all stations regardless of whether a manual pick exists.

parameter.name: preOffset
parameter.description: Data time span added to the left of either origin time or first arrival depending on the usePerStreamTimeWindows flag.

parameter.name: postOffset
parameter.description: Data time span added to the right of the requested time window.

parameter.name: minimumTimeWindow
parameter.description: Minimum data time window length.

parameter.name: alignmentPosition
parameter.description: Relative position of the alignment when traces are aligned at a phase. Bound to [0:1] where 0 is left and 1 is right.

parameter.name: rotation
parameter.description: Initial component waveform rotation applied in the picker.

parameter.name: unit
parameter.description: Unit the waveform data is converted to initially.

parameter.name: repickerStart
parameter.description: Start of the re-picker time window relative to the cursor position on the trace.

parameter.name: repickerEnd
parameter.description: End of the re-picker time window relative to the cursor position on the trace.

parameter.name: filters
parameter.description: List of filters available in the picker. Format: "name1;filter-definition1", "name2;filter-definition2"

parameter.name: limitFilterToZoomTrace
parameter.description: Apply the current filter only to the zoom trace rather than all traces. Mainly a performance optimisation for large numbers of channels.

parameter.name: velocityChannelCodes
parameter.description: Channel codes used when searching for velocity channels. Only consulted when meta data does not provide this information.

parameter.name: accelerationChannelCodes
parameter.description: Channel codes used when searching for acceleration channels. Only consulted when meta data does not provide this information.

parameter.name: showPhases
parameter.description: Phases for which theoretical arrival times are shown in the picker.

parameter.name: phases
parameter.description: Phases available for picking in the Picking menu. Not accessible via hot keys (use "picker.phases.favourites" for that). Used when "picker.phases.groups" is not defined.

parameter.name: uncertainties
parameter.description: List of pre-defined pick uncertainties. Each item is either a single double or an asymmetric pair, e.g. "0.1","(0.1,0.2)". Only used if "picker.uncertainties.preferred" is not set.

parameter.name: componentFollowsMouse
parameter.description: If enabled, the selected component for all traces changes according to the mouse position in the zoom trace. If disabled (default), only the zoom trace component changes.

parameter.name: showAmpLevel
parameter.description: Show an amplitude level indicator (0–100) in the upper-right corner of the zoom trace for accessibility support.

group.name: auxiliary
group.description: Profiles for loading auxiliary channels at configurable distance ranges. Auxiliary channels are only loaded within their range.

parameter.name: channels
parameter.description: Wildcard patterns identifying auxiliary channels (obsolete; use profiles instead).

parameter.name: minimumDistance
parameter.description: Minimum distance to load an auxiliary channel (obsolete; use profiles instead).

parameter.name: maximumDistance
parameter.description: Maximum distance to load an auxiliary channel (obsolete; use profiles instead).

parameter.name: profiles
parameter.description: List of auxiliary channel profiles to enable.

group.name: profiles
group.description: Add profile names to "picker.auxiliary.profiles" to use them.

parameter.name: channels
parameter.description: Wildcard patterns identifying auxiliary channels. The orientation code should be '?' or '*'.

parameter.name: minimumDistance
parameter.description: Minimum epicentral distance to load the channel.

parameter.name: maximumDistance
parameter.description: Maximum epicentral distance to load the channel.

group.name: phases
group.description: Phase definitions for the picker. Phases can be selected from the Picking menu.

parameter.name: favourites
parameter.description: Phase types available for rapid picking via hot keys and in the Picking menu.

parameter.name: groups
parameter.description: List of phase group profile names to enable.

group.name: groups
group.description: Phase group profile definitions. Add names to "picker.phases.groups" to enable them.

parameter.description: List of phase types in this group.

group.name: uncertainties
group.description: Define uncertainty profiles selectable in the picker settings (F3). Profiles override the "uncertainties" parameter.

parameter.name: preferred
parameter.description: Pick uncertainty profiles to load. The first profile is the default.
List of pre-defined pick uncertainties. Each item is a single double or an asymmetric pair, e.g. "0.1","(0.1,0.2)".

group.name: integration
group.description: Settings for waveform integration applied when the desired waveform unit requires integration of sensor data.

parameter.name: preFilter
parameter.description: Optional pre-filter applied before numerical integration to stabilise the result. Applied at each integration step or once depending on "applyOnce".

parameter.name: applyOnce
parameter.description: Apply the pre-filter only before the first integration step rather than before each step.

group.name: amplitudePicker
group.description: Parameters controlling the amplitude picker window used for computing station magnitudes.

parameter.name: preOffset
parameter.description: Time span added to the left of the amplitude time window.

parameter.name: postOffset
parameter.description: Time span added to the right of the amplitude time window.

parameter.name: defaultNoiseBegin
parameter.description: Default noise window start when the amplitude time window cannot be computed (e.g. travel-time error).

parameter.name: defaultNoiseEnd
parameter.description: Default noise window end when the amplitude time window cannot be computed.

parameter.name: defaultSignalBegin
parameter.description: Default signal window start when the amplitude time window cannot be computed.

parameter.name: defaultSignalEnd
parameter.description: Default signal window end when the amplitude time window cannot be computed.

parameter.name: filters
parameter.description: Filters available in the amplitude picker. Format: "name1;filter-definition1", "name2;filter-definition2"

group.name: display
group.description: Display custom information in the Location tab.

group.name: origin
group.description: Origin information to show in the Location tab.

parameter.name: addons
parameter.description: Names of quality addon profile(s) to show in the Location tab. Each addon provides values through a script.

group.name: comment
group.description: Origin comment value to display, identified by its comment ID.

parameter.name: id
parameter.description: ID of the origin comment to display.

parameter.name: default
parameter.description: Value shown when no valid origin comment is found.

parameter.name: label
parameter.description: Label for the displayed value.

parameter.name: label
parameter.description: Label text for the information panel in the Location tab.

parameter.name: script
parameter.description: Path to the script to execute.

group.name: cities
group.description: Configuration for the Nearby Cities tab shown for each origin.

parameter.name: maxDist
parameter.description: Maximum distance in km from the origin to search for nearby cities.

parameter.name: maxCount
parameter.description: Maximum number of cities to show in the Nearby Cities tab, sorted by distance.

parameter.name: minPopulation
parameter.description: Minimum city population (in thousands) to include. Capital cities are always included regardless of population.

parameter.name: useFullState
parameter.description: If true (default), the State column and region name formats use the full state name (e.g. Queensland). If false, the short abbreviation is used (e.g. QLD). Can also be toggled at runtime via the checkbox in the Nearby Cities tab.

parameter.name: jsonFile
parameter.description: Path to an optional JSON file with additional locations to show in the Nearby Cities tab alongside the built-in cities.xml entries. Supports SeisComP path variables (@DATADIR@, @CONFIGDIR@, @ROOTDIR@, @HOMEDIR@) and shell environment variables ($VAR or ${VAR}). Example: $EATWS_SHARE_FOLDER/locations.json or @DATADIR@/locations.json. The JSON must be an array of objects with at minimum the fields "name", "lat", and "lon". Optional fields: "type", "state", "country", "population".
